US Market Analyst

Commodity Market Analyst
Gold Outlook

Gold maintains its role as a critical safe-haven as global financial stress effectively overrides the persistent headwinds of rising real interest rates and a dominant US Dollar.

Silver Outlook

Silver enters a defensive consolidation phase as the unwinding of geopolitical risk premiums and a strengthening US Dollar offset persistent structural supply deficits.

Copper Outlook

Copper prices face near-term bearish pressure as a strengthening US Dollar and elevated market volatility override persistent global supply constraints.
